top_signals.title: The AI boom is colliding with a new threat: Severe weather
top_signals.summary: Heatwaves and severe weather are raising risks for AI data centers, from grid strain to higher insurance and repair costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Burnham vows to ‘rewire’ British state
top_signals.summary: UK’s prime minister-in-waiting takes aim at centralisation and promises voters help on living costs
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin lending is entering a new institutional era, according to Silicon Valley Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Canada Sees an Opening in China’s Latest Trade Squeeze on Japan
top_signals.summary: China widened its trade dragnet on Japan Monday, adding 20 more entities, including units of Mitsubishi Electric, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries and Komatsu, to its export control blacklist. The timing undercuts Beijing's argument that Tokyo has nowhere else to turn. Three days earlier, Canada wrapped up its largest-ever trade mission to Japan with a pointed pitch: build the next critical minerals supply chain with Ottawa instead. International Trade Minister Maninder Sidhu, who led roughly 300 delegates from nearly 175 Canadian companies and organizations…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley Private Credit Fund to Sell $350 Million Bond
top_signals.summary: A Morgan Stanley private credit fund is selling investment-grade bonds to refinance debt, its first offering in just over a year.
